content: MEI financial app usage patterns: PIX is the dominant payment method in Brazil and MEI apps must integrate it. Mobile banking is the core use case. Banks haven't offered tools to help MEIs understand cash flow or use transactional data effectively. 60% of MEIs have used personal money to cover business debts - mixing personal/business finances is the #1 problem. Most common needs: (1) DAS reminders and payment, (2) expense/revenue tracking with minimal friction, (3) invoice generation, (4) cash flow visibility. Sebrae provides free spreadsheets but many MEIs don't use them consistently. SEBRAE spreadsheet-based approach is the baseline 'no-app' behavior.
